Founded

Chhattisgarh
Who We Are

A Section 8 Non-Profit Built on Collective Action

InAmigos Foundation was founded by Mr. Govind Shukla with a clear mission: to unite minds and create measurable social change. What began in Chhattisgarh now spans 28 states, powered by over 200 volunteers who believe in consistent, people-first action.

We run six structured programs covering food security, education, women empowerment, animal welfare, environmental conservation, and skill development — reaching over 50,000 beneficiaries across India.

✔ Section 8 Registered ✔ 80G & 12A Certified ✔ CSR-1 Registered ✔ NITI Aayog Registered ✔ ISO 9001:2015

Our Mission

Empower marginalised communities through structured volunteer-led action and corporate partnerships.

Our Vision

A compassionate, inclusive India where no one is left behind due to poverty or lack of opportunity.

Founder & CEO

Mr. Govind Shukla — driving a movement of purpose, transparency and lasting community change.

Our Reach

Active across 28 Indian states with on-ground programs, digital campaigns and CSR collaborations.

Our Causes

Six Programs. One Purpose.

Every initiative is structured, measurable, and driven by volunteers who are part of the communities they serve.

View All Causes →

Food & Welfare

Project Sewa

Distributing food, clothing and essentials to the underprivileged — because basic dignity is a right, not a privilege.

50,000+ meals & kits distributed Read more →

Education

Project BachpanSala

Supporting underprivileged children with school education, basic digital literacy and life skills — nurturing young minds for brighter futures.

Active across multiple states Read more →

Animal Welfare

Project Jeev

Rescuing, protecting and feeding stray animals through a dedicated volunteer network — because compassion extends beyond humanity.

50+ animals fed daily Read more →

Environment

Project Prakriti

Promoting sustainability through sapling drives, eco-friendly agriculture advocacy and environmental awareness campaigns across India.

20,000+ saplings planted Read more →

Women Empowerment

Project Udaan

Empowering rural women through self-help group collaborations, skill development, financial independence and menstrual hygiene awareness.

Soaring towards a brighter future Read more →

Skill Development

Project Vikas — Enhancing Employability Through Skills

Facilitating employment through internships in data operations, finance, research, content writing, digital marketing, social work and more. Project Vikas has trained over 30,000 interns in the last four years, building a skilled and confident workforce ready for modern India.

30,000+ interns trained in 4 years Read more →

Recent Events

Where We Showed Up

From awareness days to on-ground drives — InAmigos is always in action.

22 March 2025 · Community

World Water Day 2025

Highlighting the importance of water conservation and collective action to ensure clean water access for all communities.

20 March 2025 · Community

International Day of Happiness 2025

Spreading joy, positivity and well-being through engaging activities and inspiring conversations across our volunteer network.

11 Feb 2025 · Education

International Day of Women & Girls in Science

Celebrating women who break barriers in science — encouraging girls from underserved communities to pursue STEM fields.

Get Involved

Every Contribution Strengthens the Cause

Whether through donating, volunteering, or a corporate CSR partnership — there is a meaningful role for you in the InAmigos story.

Donate Online Volunteer with Us Join the Foundation
🎁

Donate

Your donation is tax-exempt under 80G. Every rupee goes directly to our active programs across India.

🤝

Volunteer

Join 200+ active volunteers. Contribute your time and skills to causes that need real people on the ground.

🏢

Corporate CSR

We are CSR-1 registered, making us an eligible partner for your company's Corporate Social Responsibility initiatives.
